_schema.name: short project title
_schema.spec_url: deep link to the spec doc (usually docs/research/...)
_schema.color: ZAO palette key: orange | cyan | gold | pink | zabal
_schema.claimed_by: Farcaster handle of the builder (if claimed)

projects.name: Songjam leaderboard migration
projects.description: Move the Songjam leaderboard off the deprecated X scraper onto an Empire Builder API leaderboard. Frees Adam from scraper maintenance, gives ZABAL Farcaster-native data.

projects.name: POIDH bounty leaderboard
projects.description: Empire Builder leaderboard pulling on-chain POIDH bounty submissions. Counts unique submitters across all ZABAL bounties. One contract wired, second pending.

projects.name: zlank Empire daily-stats Snap template
projects.description: A one-click Today's Empire Builder Stats Snap template on zlank.online. Footy app is the reference. kmac.eth + Zaal collab.

projects.name: Twitch to Empire Builder stream feed
projects.description: StreamElements WebSocket events feed an apiLeaderboard. Stream activity becomes a real-time Empire leaderboard for any creator running Twitch + an empire.

projects.name: A new ZOE skill
projects.description: Extend the ZOE concierge bot (Telegram @zaoclaw_bot). Backend mirrors the Hermes runtime pattern - Claude Code CLI as subprocess, swap the system prompt.

projects.name: This /zabal mini app
projects.description: The Farcaster mini app you are on. Extend the workshops calendar, the submissions board, the connector NFT flow. Highest meta-leverage build.

projects.name: COC Concertz content pipeline
projects.description: Today: record show -> Descript -> newsletter builder generates YouTube descriptions -> manual cross-post. Automate the cross-post end. Bridges to ZAO's src/lib/publish/ module.

projects.name: Streaming auto-clip flywheel
projects.description: Turn 24h of stream into ~150 short clips for TikTok / Reels / YouTube / Farcaster. The content engine that processes ZABAL Games streams and every future ZAO event.

projects.name: WaveWarZ-Base Finals settlement surface
projects.description: Wire the WaveWarZ-Base smart contracts into the ZABAL Games Finals page. Read live battle state, render the trade view per finalist, trigger settlement readout at T+72h. Pairs with Sam + Arthur's smart-contract work. Makes the Finals the V1 launch event for WaveWarZ-Base.

projects.name: ZAOVideoEditor (starter repo)
projects.description: Multi-track web video editor for music battle clips. Starter repo exists (bettercallzaal/ZAOVideoEditor) with scope sketch only. Builder owns full spec: ingestion + timeline + effects + FFmpeg export + Audius/Zora share. Pair with #08 streaming auto-clip flywheel for end-to-end content pipeline.

projects.name: ZAONEXUS - ecosystem connection graph (starter repo)
projects.description: Knowledge graph for The ZAO members + projects + skills. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/ZAONEXUS) is a stub. Builder picks: graph DB (Neo4j or similar) -> scrape ZAOOS for entities -> discovery UI with filters + search + recommend engine. Bonfire kEngram 'zabal-ecosystem' is a near-neighbor; check before building.

projects.name: ZAOFlights - group travel coordinator (starter repo)
projects.description: Group travel logistics for ZAO members - flight search + booking coordination + cost split + calendar sync. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/ZAOFlights) is a stub. Builder integrates Skyscanner or Kiwi API, builds frontend, ties to Cal.com / Lu.ma for trip events.

projects.name: CoCConcertZ - concert discovery + calendar (starter repo)
projects.description: Concert event discovery surfaced for The ZAO music community. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/CoCConcertZ) is a stub. Builder picks Songkick or Bandsintown API, filters by date/genre/venue, exports to ICS, casts to Farcaster. Lighter touch than #10; medium scope.

projects.name: ZAO 101 - educational onboarding guide (starter repo)
projects.description: Beginner guide to The ZAO ecosystem - what it is, how to join, contribution paths, success stories, FAQ. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/zao-101) is a stub. Smallest scope on this list - static site with 5-7 pages, Mermaid diagrams, glossary. Content mostly derivable from ZAOOS research + this prompt. Good first adoption.

projects.name: Aurdour - web DJ platform with Flow Mode (starter repo)
projects.description: Browser-based two-deck DJ app with auto-mix Flow Mode for non-DJs. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/Aurdour) is a concept sketch. Builder owns: Web Audio API mixing, waveform viz, cross-fader, EQ, beat-matching, ML model for Flow Mode track sequencing. Largest scope on this list - real audio engineering. Ships best as a Farcaster Mini App.

projects.name: ZOUNZ - music mini app (starter repo)
projects.description: Farcaster Mini App for music discovery + creation. Starter repo (bettercallzaal/ZOUNZ) has architecture sketch. Builder wires: AI generation (OpenAI / ElevenLabs), Audius search, Zora NFT mint (Base), Attention Markets trade (Solana), multi-screen mini app UX. Most ambitious - 4 protocols stitched. Pair with #03 zlank if you want a no-code Snap variant first.

projects.name: ZAO Snaps tab on zlank - ZABAL Games slice (8 templates)
projects.description: Part of the bigger ZAO Snaps featured-collab tab on zlank (issue #64). This adoptable scope is the ZABAL Games slice - 8 unbuilt templates: workshop-lead book-your-slot, workshop RSVP card, daily Empire stats one-click cast, Finals market view, adopt-a-project picker, build-progress weekly post, winner announce, season recap. Each plugs into existing ZAO rails (Cal.com, Lu.ma, Empire Builder, WaveWarZ-Base, adoptable-projects.json). Template #1 (signup) is shipped via PR #63. Other slices (Fractal, COC Concertz, WaveWarZ, ZAOstock, ZAO Music) are open for separate adoptables.
